name: vitahub
description: VITAHUB — Sistema de Gestión de Agencia

scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && cd apps/api && npm run build
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && cd apps/web && npm run build
scripts.build:cpanel: npm run build:shared && cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../web && npm run build
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && cd apps/api && npm run start:dev
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && cd apps/web && npm run dev
scripts.deploy:web:cpanel: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$dest = Join-Path $HOME 'public_html'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $dest 'assets')) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force (Join-Path $dest 'assets') }; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/dist/* $dest"
